reopen_requires: a second independently validated full unified score-matrix expert for a specific competition

policy: Do not create a nominal MoE around one valid expert or reuse rejected components under new names. Until a second full-matrix expert passes all gates for a competition, the formal core remains the sole probability expert and MoE weight remains 0.
